# technitium_catalog_zone_membership (Resource)

Manages catalog zone membership for a DNS zone on a Technitium DNS Server.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "technitium_dns_zone" "catalog" {
  name = "catalog.example.com"
  type = "Catalog"
}

resource "technitium_dns_zone" "member" {
  name = "member.example.com"
  type = "Primary"
}

resource "technitium_catalog_zone_membership" "member" {
  zone         = technitium_dns_zone.member.name
  catalog_zone = technitium_dns_zone.catalog.name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `catalog_zone` (String) The catalog zone to assign this zone to.
- `zone` (String) The domain name of the member zone.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Identifier for the resource. Same as the zone name.
